top_signals.title: Oil Drops to Four-Month Low as Talks Conclude in Doha
top_signals.summary: Oil prices fell more than 1% to a four-month low on Thursday as concerns over supply disruptions eased after mediator Qatar said Iran and the U.S. made progress in talks over ending the four-month war that shut the key shipping through the Strait of Hormuz.Brent futures were $1.03…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Brazil’s Durigan Says Credit Lines Won’t Affect Monetary Policy
top_signals.summary: Credit measures introduced by President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva’s government do not undermine monetary policy, Finance Minister Dario Durigan said in an interview with local news website G1 published on Saturday.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Storms force evacuation of July 4 celebrations in Washington
top_signals.summary: Trump to speak at Lincoln Memorial as extreme heat and thunderstorms disrupt 250th anniversary events
